caption: The video depicts a formal meeting or conference setting where two men, both dressed in suits and wearing lanyards, are seated at a table with microphones in front of them. The man on the left, identified as Masood Ahmed, is seen handling a small object, possibly a pen or a piece of paper, while the man on the right, Akinari Horii, appears to be speaking into the microphone. The background features a patterned wall, and the table is set with various bottles of water and other beverages. The atmosphere suggests a professional discussion or presentation, likely related to policy or business matters, given the context and attire of the participants.
